title: Instant Harvest
description: When harvesting with a hoe makes all the crop harvest and replant itself making farming easier and can be toggle to on/off
body:
# **Instant Harvest**
Overview
Instant Harvest is a Fabric mod that simplifies farming by letting you harvest and replant all crops in your current chunk with a single click. No more tedious row-by-row harvesting—just click once and watch your entire farm get collected and replanted automatically.

## **Features**
•One-Click Harvest: Left-click any fully grown crop while holding any item to harvest ALL mature crops in your current chunk instantly

•Auto-Replant: Seeds are automatically planted back in the same spots after harvesting

•No Special Tools Required: Works with any item in your hand—no hoe or specific tool needed

•Toggle System: Press the H key (configurable) to open a settings menu where you can turn the feature on or off

•Supported Crops: Wheat, Carrots, Potatoes, Beetroots, and Nether Wart

## **How to Use**
•Join your world—the feature is enabled by default

•Hold any item in your hand

•Left-click any fully grown crop in your chunk

•All mature crops in the chunk will be harvested and replanted automatically

•Collect the dropped items from the ground

•Press H to open the settings menu if you want to toggle the feature off

## **Known Limitations**
Only harvests crops within your current chunk, not your entire farm
Only fully grown crops are harvested—immature crops remain untouched
Requires the mod to be installed on the server side
